title: astragalus triflorus var. insularis
intro: Astragalus triflorus var. insularis, also known as the Island milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic and immune-boosting properties, containing compounds such as astragalosides and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Astragalus triflorus var. insularis are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to improve overall health and wellbeing by reducing stress and promoting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, capsules, and tinctures to support respiratory health and enhance the body's natural defenses against illness and disease.
